about.title: KARDRA
about.text1: Kardra builds automation solutions that turn manual processes into faster, clearer, more scalable systems.
about.text2: We offer ready-to-deploy products and custom services — whatever fits the needs of your operation.

contact.title: CONTACT KARDRA
contact.text: Tell us what process you want to automate and let's figure out the best way to solve it.

form.name: Name
form.message: What process do you want to automate?

items.q: Does Kardra offer products or services?
items.a: Both. Kardra offers ready-to-deploy products (pre-built automations) and custom services (automations designed around your operation). You can choose one or combine them.
It depends on what you choose. Products are pre-built solutions for common processes. Services are fully customized to how your business works.

items.q: Can a solution be implemented without overhauling my entire operation?
items.a: Yes. We work modularly. You can start by automating one specific process without transforming your whole operation upfront.

items.q: How do I know whether I need a product or a service?
items.a: If your process is a common one (expense management, income tracking, reports), a product will likely do the job. If your process has particularities unique to your business, a custom service is the better fit. We can guide you before you decide.

items.q: Can I reach out before deciding?
items.a: Absolutely — that's what we recommend. Tell us what process you want to automate and we'll walk you through which option makes the most sense for your case.

items.q: How long does it take to implement an automation?
items.a: It depends on the type of solution. Products, being pre-built, can be implemented quickly. Custom services require a prior analysis and design phase. Once you tell us about your process, we can give you a realistic estimate for your case.

footer.tagline: Turning manual processes into automated systems.
